value.0: Hey there <Lad/Lass>, what can this ol' dwarf do fer ya?
Arg, I can only be changing one item at a time. Just one, har har har.
Either the item quality is to good for me to modify, or there is not just 1 item on the forge.
Are ye sure ye want to be changin' the <CUSTOM100>?
What type of modification would you like?
Choose the amount of the reduction.
Now please select the skill to be enhanced.
What effect would you like when hitting with the weapon?
What saving throw is necessary to avoid the effect?
What saving throw is necessary to avoid the effect?
Select the ability to be reduced.
Please choose one of the following names:
It would seem that NWN doesn't have a function for renaming items. If they do ever add one, I will use it here.
Please tell me what damage type you would like resistance against.
How much damage should be resisted?
What weapon enhancement level is necessary to get past the damage reduction?
How much damage should be absorbed?
Please tell me what damage type you would like.
Choose the bonus feat you would like.
Now, please select the bonus amount.
Please wait while I calculate the cost of this modification.
There is no charge for this modification.
This modification will give you a refund of <CUSTOM101> gold.
This modification will cost you <CUSTOM101> gold.
This modification will cost you <CUSTOM101> gold.
Now, please select the bonus amount.
Please wait while I calculate the cost of this modification.
There is no charge for this modification.
This modification will give you a refund of <CUSTOM101> gold.
This modification will cost you <CUSTOM101> gold.
This modification will cost you <CUSTOM101> gold.
Select the ability to be enhanced.
Arrr, this'll strip EVERY magical property from yer <CUSTOM100>! Based on what ye've put in here, ye'll be refunded <CUSTOM101> gold. There be no undoing this! Are ye certain?
What damage type would you like immunity from?
Arg, if it be items yer wantin me to forge, put one on thar anvil, and I'll............ fix......them

There be rumors all over these parts. Hard to split the dung pile from the gems if ya take my meanin. But I do know that the graveyard at the top o' the hill on outskirts of town is under some sort of bewitchment. Ya best steer clear of the South West after nightfall.
I wanna change the item in the forge
Remove all magical properties from the item.
I'd like to rename the object.
On second thoughts, maybe I'll stick with the current name.
Sorry, I don't seem to have enough gold.
Sorry, I don't seem to have enough gold.
Aye, strip all magical properties from my <CUSTOM100>.
No, leave my <CUSTOM100> as it is.
I'd like to use yer forge.
I'd like to see what you have in stock.
Can you tell me of any rumors circulating.
Thanks, I'll keep that in mind.
